author: AdExchanger Guest Columnist
title: Agentic Advertising Isn’t Reducing Intermediaries. It’s Just Rebuilding Them
description: As agentic advertising gains momentum, publishers now face a familiar quandary in a new form. The promise of agentic advertising is appealing. If software can automate planning, packaging, forecasting, proposal generation and campaign execution, publishers sh…
